subparts.description: Define OKLCH/HSL color tokens in :root and [data-theme='dark']
subparts.verification_step: Browser DevTools computed styles show OKLCH values parsing correctly

subparts.description: Fluid typography scale using clamp() from xs to display
subparts.verification_step: Resize viewport from 320px to 1440px — no font size layout shifts

subparts.description: Enforce impeccable design bans: no ghost-cards, no gradient text, no numbered headers, no emoji icons
subparts.deliverable: Audit checklist verified in code review
subparts.verification_step: Search codebase for box-shadow+border combos on .card, background-clip:text, sequential h2 numbering

subparts.description: prefers-reduced-motion override for all animations including .alert-pulse
subparts.verification_step: Enable OS reduced motion preference → alert-pulse animation stops

roadmap.verification_gate: npm run build passes 0 errors; CSS tokens render correctly in Chromium

subparts.description: Signal weight constants for 5 sensor streams (flow, scans, sentiment, weather, historical)
subparts.verification_step: Unit test: weights sum is 1.0 ± 0.001

subparts.description: calculateConfidence() with cross-validation penalty (<3 signals → 0.5x) and bonus (>=4 signals → 1.1x)
subparts.verification_step: Unit test matrix: 2 signals → confidence < 50%; 5 signals at max → confidence >= 80%

subparts.description: triggerGate7Surge() manual override for demo scenario
subparts.deliverable: Deterministic injection of Gate 7 surge state
subparts.verification_step: Click 'Inject Gate 7 Surge' → state.simulationStatus === 'predicting' within 1s

roadmap.verification_gate: calculateConfidence test suite passes; manual surge trigger produces confidence >= 75%

subparts.description: LocalSyncManager: BroadcastChannel message handler + localStorage persistence
subparts.verification_step: Open operator + fan tabs → trigger surge in one → other updates within 500ms

subparts.description: Late-joining tab hydration from localStorage
subparts.verification_step: Trigger surge → open /volunteer in new tab → volunteer sees active task immediately

subparts.description: Firebase Firestore integration with LocalSync fallback
subparts.deliverable: syncStore.subscribeState() works with or without Firebase credentials
subparts.verification_step: Without .env.local: LocalSync mode. With .env.local: Firestore real-time updates

roadmap.verification_gate: Cross-tab state propagation verified in browser; late-join hydration works for all 3 views

subparts.description: 3-column responsive layout (telemetry | SentinelAI | volunteers)
subparts.verification_step: Mobile 375px: stacks vertically. Desktop 1200px: 3 columns (1fr 1.5fr 1fr)

subparts.description: ConfidenceBar meter component with ARIA role='meter'
subparts.deliverable: ConfidenceBar component with color-coded bar and aria attributes
subparts.verification_step: Screen reader announces 'SentinelAI confidence score: 81%' on alert activation

subparts.description: Approve dispatch → multilingual volunteer task assignment
subparts.deliverable: handleApproveDispatch() updates volunteer tasks in Portuguese and Spanish
subparts.verification_step: Click Approve → Maria's task.title === 'Direcionar Fluxo do Portão 7 para Portão 7B'

roadmap.verification_gate: Full E2E demo flow: Surge inject → Alert panel → Approve dispatch → Volunteer notified

subparts.description: Mobile-first layout (max-width: 420px) with 48px touch targets
subparts.verification_step: Mobile Chrome DevTools: all interactive elements >= 48px

subparts.description: Portuguese-localized emergency task card with dispatch timestamp from state
subparts.verification_step: Dispatch time shown matches operator approve time, not browser clock

subparts.description: Sustainability eco-tip on volunteer task card
subparts.deliverable: Eco tip showing HVAC energy savings from crowd redirection
subparts.verification_step: Task card renders eco tip when maria.task is not null

roadmap.verification_gate: Maria's flow: Notified → Confirm position → Mark complete → Operator log updated

subparts.description: Arabic RTL layout with language toggle (AR/EN)
subparts.deliverable: direction: rtl applied to wrapper div when language === 'ar'
subparts.verification_step: Switch to AR → layout mirrors, text is right-aligned

subparts.description: Dynamic SVG routing map with incident-aware path switching
subparts.deliverable: Green detour path (Gate 7B) replaces blue direct path on incident
subparts.verification_step: Trigger surge → SVG shows red dashed Gate 7 + green bold Gate 7B path

subparts.description: Transport tab: shuttle/metro wait times with eco-friendly flags
subparts.deliverable: SHUTTLE_STATUS array rendered as cards with wait time color coding
subparts.verification_step: Transport tab renders 3 shuttle options with wait times < 5min in green

subparts.description: Eco tab: sustainability metrics (renewable energy %, waste recycled %, transit usage %)
subparts.verification_step: Eco tab renders and metrics are displayed with correct color coding

roadmap.verification_gate: All 3 tabs render; Arabic RTL correct; detour alert fires on dispatch; accessibility toggle changes SVG

subparts.description: GEMINI_API_KEY server-side only (no NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix)
subparts.verification_step: grep for NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI in codebase returns 0 results

subparts.description: Security HTTP headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection)
subparts.verification_step: curl -I http://localhost:3000 shows X-Frame-Options: DENY

subparts.description: Input sanitization in /api/translate (length limit, supported lang allowlist)
subparts.verification_step: POST with 10000 char text: truncated to 2000. POST with unknown lang: 400 error

roadmap.verification_gate: Security headers present; Gemini key not in client bundle; input validation tested
